persona.name: Thomas Müller
responsibilities: Optimize portfolio performance across 20+ wind/solar assets
Drive cost reduction and operational efficiency

objective_1.title: Portfolio Performance
objective_1.description: Maximize ROI across all managed assets with real-time visibility.
objective_1.pain_point_1: Fragmented data across spreadsheets and tools
objective_1.pain_point_2: No single source of truth for portfolio status

objective_2.title: Operational Efficiency
objective_2.description: Reduce manual reporting effort and streamline workflows.
objective_2.pain_point_1: Analysts spend 60% of time on manual data aggregation

objective_3.title: Governance & Compliance
objective_3.description: Maintain audit trails and meet regulatory requirements.
objective_3.pain_point_2: Investor reporting is time-consuming and error-prone

objective_4.title: Scalability
objective_4.description: Grow portfolio without proportional increase in headcount.
objective_4.kpi2: Onboarding time for new assets < 2 weeks
objective_4.pain_point_1: Every new asset requires additional manual effort
objective_4.winning_trigger: Add 10 assets with the same team size

value_proposition.what_is: NUO is a SaaS platform for renewable energy asset portfolio management.
value_proposition.what_does: It centralizes asset data, automates performance monitoring, and generates investor-ready reports.
value_proposition.how_works: Connect your data sources, define KPIs, and get real-time dashboards and automated alerts.
value_proposition.value_to_customer: Reduce manual reporting effort by 60%, improve portfolio uptime, and scale without adding headcount.

slogans: From data chaos to portfolio control – in days, not months.
The operating system for renewable energy asset managers.
Scale your portfolio. Not your team.

customer_mental_model.objective: Maximize portfolio ROI with minimal operational overhead
driving_factors: Investor pressure for transparent, real-time reporting
pain_points: Fragmented tools create data silos and manual reconciliation
Slow reporting cycles miss critical performance issues

usps.title: Renewable Energy Native
body: Built specifically for wind, solar, and storage asset management
Pre-built KPI frameworks aligned to industry standards

usps.title: Platform + Expert Services
body: Combine software automation with Vector's AM expertise
DIY, hybrid, or fully outsourced operating model
Single vendor for software and advisory

usps.title: Rapid Time-to-Value
body: Templated onboarding and data migration support

commercial_insight.title: The Control Tower Insight
narratives: We work with asset managers that want to maximize portfolio ROI but face fragmented tools and manual reporting that slow them down.
Most teams try to solve this with more analysts or custom spreadsheets, but the issue is better solved with a centralized performance monitoring platform.
NUO is uniquely positioned to deliver this as the only renewable energy-native SaaS platform combining software automation with deep asset management expertise.
